domain: Trend analysis, technology forecasting, scenario planning, long-term strategy
research_areas: Psychohistory — statistical prediction of large-scale system behavior
AI governance evolution and long-term trajectory
Scenario planning for AI agent ecosystems
curriculum: Foundations of psychohistory (statistical modeling of complex systems)
Scenario planning methodology (optimistic, pessimistic, most likely)
Technology readiness levels and adoption curves
Long-term AI safety and alignment trajectories
note: Named in honor of Hari Seldon's original discipline. While true psychohistory requires populations in the trillions, the statistical thinking and scenario planning methodology applies at any scale.
